name: cloudflare-waf
description: OctoBus package for Cloudflare WAF / firewall: IP block, unblock, access-rule query, and zone security level get/set through the Cloudflare API v4.

Cloudflare_WAF.Cloudflare_WAF/BlockIP.name: block-ip
Cloudflare_WAF.Cloudflare_WAF/BlockIP.description: Block IPs through Cloudflare IP access rules.

Cloudflare_WAF.Cloudflare_WAF/UnblockIP.name: unblock-ip
Cloudflare_WAF.Cloudflare_WAF/UnblockIP.description: Unblock IPs by deleting matching Cloudflare access rules.
